coinDescs:
Spend 1 [Bullet]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Double the application of [Vibration] & [Burst] Potency and Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Vibration] and +1 [Vibration] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Burst] and +1 [Burst] Count
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] Gain 4 [Breath]
Gain +1 Coin Power for every 7 [Breath] on self (max 2)
coinDescs:
Spend 1 [Bullet]
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Double the application of [Vibration] & [Burst] Potency and Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 4 [Vibration] and +2 [Vibration] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 4 [Burst] and +2 [Burst] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]

1040601.name: A S.B.
1040601.desc: If this unit has 7+ [Breath] at Turn End, heal 8 SP.

1040602.name: A S.B.
1040602.desc:
- Always Active : Begin encounters with 7 [Bullet]
- If this unit has 7+ [Breath] at Turn End, heal 8 SP.

1040611.name: A S.B.
1040611.desc:
- Always Active : Begin encounters with 7 [Bullet]
- If this unit has 7+ [Breath] at Turn End, heal 8 SP.
- If this unit already has max SP upon meeting the above condition, gain 1 [Breath] next turn

1040621.name: The Lucky Cig
1040621.desc: If 1 ally with the least [Bullet] uses up their last [Bullet] with a Coin, deal 50% of the damage dealt by that Coin attack against each target as bonus damage against each individual target. (rounded up)

1040631.name: The Lucky Cig
1040631.desc:
- If 1 ally with the least [Bullet] uses a Skill that spends [Bullet], gain 3 [Breath]. (once per turn; does not apply to allies without [Bullet])
- If 1 ally with the least [Bullet] uses up their last [Bullet] with a Coin, deal 50% of the damage dealt by that Coin attack against each target as bonus damage against each individual target. (rounded up)
